message:
test(native-mux): add 39 property-based tests for fleet launcher and headless mux server

Two new proptest suites for the native mux subsystem:
- proptest_fleet_launcher (21 tests): weighted allocation invariants, serde roundtrips,
  slot identity uniqueness, phase coverage, environment propagation, entity counts
- proptest_headless_mux_server (18 tests): federation join/leave/heartbeat, peer health
  pruning, checkpoint uniqueness, entity listing, remote protocol coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
